requirements.text: The system shall provide an input field for the truck pickup location or zip code.
The system shall provide an input field for the truck pickup date.
The system shall display a calendar widget to allow the user to select a pickup date.
The system shall display the selected pickup date and return date, indicating if it is a 'same day rental'.
The system shall display the selected pickup location (zip code) in the progress header.
The system shall display the selected truck type, its daily rental rate, and its per-mile rate.
The system shall provide a mileage estimator section with an input field for estimated miles.
The system shall calculate and display the estimated mileage cost based on the entered miles and the per-mile rate.
The system shall present a section for choosing add-ons, including 'Furniture Pad' and 'Hand Truck'.
The system shall provide a quantity selector for each available add-on, such as 'Furniture Pad'.
The system shall display the price per unit and unit type for each add-on.
The system shall display a multi-step progress indicator to guide the user through the rental process.
